description_long: This is an ornate chandelier with eight elegantly curved arms radiating from a central stem, each arm supporting a lampshade. The shades are semi-translucent and bell-shaped, likely made of glass or acrylic, and each is adorned with small decorative pendants hanging from the rim. The central column is robust and features a decorative finial at the bottom, while the top is connected to a ceiling mount via a fabric-wrapped chain or cord. The overall design is symmetrical and classic, evoking a sense of luxury and sophistication. The chandelier is predominantly a glossy white, giving it a clean and modern yet timeless appearance. The decorative elements and multiple light sources suggest it is intended for upscale urban interiors such as lobbies, ballrooms, or high-end restaurants.
description: A glossy white chandelier with eight curved arms, each holding a bell-shaped shade and decorative pendants, suspended by a fabric-wrapped chain. The design is ornate and symmetrical, suitable for elegant urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all eight arms and shades symmetrically arranged, with the central stem and decorative pendants clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still showing the symmetrical arrangement of arms and shades, with the fabric-wrapped chain and central finial visible.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, nearly identical to the previous, highlighting the even spacing of the arms and the uniformity of the shades.
description_view_3: Similar to other views, showing the chandelier's symmetry and decorative details, with the chain and central structure prominent.
